title: O LORD, You Are the Righteous One

verses.text: My zeal consumes me utterly, because my foes forget your word. Because your words are very pure, your servant loves your promise, LORD.
Your precepts I do not forget, though I am held in low esteem. Your justice is forever right; your law is faithfulness indeed.
Distress and trouble found me out, but your commands are my delight. Grant wisdom so that I may live; your statutes are forever right.
